sections.paragraph: ψάλλω [etym. complex; ‘cause to vibrate’, ‘pluck’ the string of a musical instrument, ordinarily w. vocal accompaniment] ‘sing in celebratory manner’, indeterminate whether with or without instrumental accompaniment, sing song(s) of praise Ro 15:9; Eph 5:19; abs. Js 5:13. With focus on use of mental faculties so that the thought can be followed 1 Cor 14:15.
